prompts.decision.private-chat: Say hello in one concise sentence.
prompts.decision.tool-heavy-coding: Write a Python function that returns the nth Fibonacci number.
prompts.decision.long-context-memory: Summarize the key facts from a long meeting transcript into JSON fields.
prompts.decision.low-latency-local: Respond with a short local-friendly status message.

decision.structured-json.prompt: Return a JSON object with keys message and severity.

prompts.decision.cost-sensitive-remote: Summarize this support ticket in two short bullet points.
